action: Hit this API to check the video status and retry after 5 minutes if null, inform the creator.
fallback_action: If hitting the API to check the video status and retrying after 5 minutes fails in the future, try again after 5 minutes.

recipe.steps: Hit the API to check the video status using the conversation ID.
recipe.generalized_functions:
import requests

# Define the user_id
conv_id = 64567

# Define the API URL
api_url = f"https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}}"

# Make the API call to retrieve the avatar IDs
response = requests.get(api_url)

# Check if the response is successful
if response.status_code == 200:
    response = response.json()
else:
    response = None

print(response)

recipe.steps: If the video status is null, schedule a retry after 5 minutes.
Ask the StatusVerifier agent to confirm the completion of the action.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Retry checking the video status using the conversation ID and inform the creator if necessary.
